liquidityNotes: RWA.xyz states that direct redemption requires users to log in or sign up and verify an account with TG Commodities Limited, with physical gold delivery available above a larger minimum. RWA.xyz lists direct purchase from verified users with a minimum of 50 fine troy ounces / 50 XAUt and physical delivery/redemption minimum around 430 XAUt. CoinMarketCap and CoinGecko show active secondary-market trading volume, but redemption timing, bid-ask spread, and on-chain liquidity depth were not verified from official sources. Liquidity score is conservative because exchange liquidity exists but direct physical redemption is constrained by verification and minimum-size requirements.
